name: Marinated Lamb Brains in Lemon Sauce

ingredients.item: Lamb brains are available in Greek meat markets.
finely chopped dill or flat-leaf parsley
Wash brains thoroughly and soak in lukewarm water for 10 minutes.
Place brains in boiling salted water to cover; add vinegar and simmer, covered, for 20 to 30 minutes, or until soft. Drain.
Cut into ½-inch cubes and let cool.
Add olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and dill or parsley.
Serve at room temperature or cold.
